title: My money line begins with me
subtitle: A declaration for the moment you decide the pattern ends here.
excerpt: A short affirmation for when the inherited money pattern is visible and you are choosing not to pass it on. Say it hand on heart, once a day, for a week.
sourceNotes: Adapted from Day 8 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025), "Acknowledge family money stories."

practice.whenToUse: Use when you are consciously working on a money pattern that runs in the family and you want a daily anchor for the choice to do it differently.

content.text: A short affirmation for the moment when you can see clearly that a money pattern was handed to you rather than chosen. The statement names the choice to be the first person in the line who does it differently.
My money line begins with me. I am the first person in my family to hold money with ease. What I build here passes forward.

Say it out loud, hand on heart, three times in the morning. If a phrase feels untrue, sit with the smaller true version: "I am the first person in my family who is trying to hold money differently." That is enough to start.

Adapted from Day 8 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025), which addresses the inherited money beliefs that run families across generations and offers practices for stepping out of that pattern.
